description: Reflector-oracle auto-resolution for prediction markets. The resolver reads the market's asset/threshold/expiry, pulls the price from the Reflector CEX/DEX oracle at expiry, and settles YES/NO on-chain. Created markets are wired to the resolver at deploy time via set_resolver, so the outcome is oracle-set, not admin-set.

e2e.flow: deploy market (new wasm) -> set_resolver(creator, resolver) -> resolver.resolve_market -> reads Reflector XLM ~$0.21 < $0.25 -> outcome No

notes: Existing markets (flagship XLM, ETH, BNB) run the older market wasm without set_resolver, so they stay admin-resolved. New markets created via the app use the new wasm and auto-resolve. Triggering resolve_market after expiry is permissionless (anyone can call it); a keeper is the hands-off option. Unaudited research prototype, testnet only.
